name: 45 - Wd Operational Decision Packet Integration TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — inactive, gate B live, configure classifier URL + Telegram in n8n UI only, no secrets in Git.

Wd: event -> classifier-server -> operational-style Decision Packet Telegram (TEST ONLY).

Gate 2 OPEN ON SEND: writes TEST ONLY open decision to control_plane_decisions_test only (Data Table by name). NOT control_plane_state. If decision_id already closed, do NOT reopen (blocked/duplicate_open_attempt) and do NOT send.

Before running:
1) Import as workflow 45; keep INACTIVE
2) Start classifier-server on Ryzen; set **CONFIGURE_CLASSIFIER_SERVER_URL_IN_N8N_UI** (POST .../classify)
3) Configure Telegram credential **CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_CREDENTIAL_IN_N8N_UI** (CONTROL PLANE - Telegram Bot)
4) Configure chat_id **CONFIGURE_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI**
5) Create Data Table control_plane_decisions_test in n8n UI (not in Git)
6) Manual Trigger ONCE

Risk open_without_send: row may be open before Telegram send fails — verified at Gate 3 runtime user-attested.

No wf40/41/42, no control_plane_state, no GitHub write, no PM-34, no Schedule/Webhook.

GE-01 fix (repo-only): Collapse load fan-out before Prepare; max 1 item per decision_id before Telegram; duplicate_open_attempt = blocked terminal (send_suppressed, no send). Import live = separate gated step.

nodes.name: NOTE - template only gate B live

parameters.content:
PASS (gate B live): classifier HTTP 200 + valid 5-field output; one TEST ONLY Telegram; D-9998-T; underscores literal; workflow INACTIVE.

BLOCKED: server down, bad classifier JSON, Telegram fail, secrets leak, wf40/41/PM-34/Data Table/GitHub touched.

After run: docs/runtime/WD_OPERATIONAL_DECISION_PACKET_REGISTRATION_PROMPT.md
